timelines.q: How long does a project take?
timelines.a: We usually deliver within 1-4 weeks depending on scope.

pricing.a: We offer transparent plans and custom proposals based on goals.

technologies.a: We build with modern AI, web, and mobile stacks like Next.js and Python.

support.a: Yes — we support deployments, updates, and continued improvement.

maintenance.a: Absolutely — we improve and scale established systems.

ai.q: Can you help with AI strategy?
ai.a: We advise on product fit, data strategy, and deployment readiness.
